Telekinesis decreases opponent's Defense: Telekinesis decreases opponent's Defense and Special Defense by two stages.
Gravity, Magic Room, Trick Room, Wonder: Gravity, Magic Room, Trick Room, Wonder Room
Boosts Special Attack by two stages, but: Boosts Special Attack by two stages, but confuses the user.
Weather effects have a random duration b: Weather effects have a random duration between 3-8 turns.
Generated Terrain overlays have a random: Generated Terrain overlays have a random duration between 3-8 turns.
Room effects and Gravity have a random d: Room effects and Gravity  have a random duration between 3-8 turns.
{movesAnd} cause the user to take 25% of: {movesAnd} cause the user to take 25% of their max HP as damage after the execution of the first portion of the move unless they are Shadow. Sky Drop deals that same damage to the target of the move aswell.
Sleeping Pokémon take 1/16th HP damage e: Sleeping Pokémon take 1/16th HP damage each turn.
Rage becomes a 60 Power Dark-Type move t: Rage becomes a 60 Power Dark-Type move that boosts Attack by one stage when used. Rage's normal effect is negated.
Obstruct additionally protects from non-: Obstruct additionally protects from non-damaging moves.
Berserk boosts Special Attack by one sta: Berserk boosts Special Attack by one stage upon switching in.
Anger Point and Justified boost Attack b: Anger Point and Justified boost Attack by one stage upon switching in.
Unnerve lowers the opponent's Speed by o: Unnerve lowers the opponent's Speed by one stage upon switching in.
Pressure lowers the opponent's Defense a: Pressure lowers the opponent's Defense and Special Defense by one stage upon switching in.
Shadow Shield's effect does not require: Shadow Shield's effect does not require the user to be at full HP.
Beads of Ruin, Sword of Ruin, Tablets of: Beads of Ruin, Sword of Ruin, Tablets of Ruin, and Vessel of Ruin do not reduce allies' stats.
Pokémon with Dark Aura restore their HP: Pokémon with Dark Aura restore their HP by 25% of the damage they dealt when they attack.
Download changes the user into a random: Download changes the user into a random Type each turn.
Pokémon which the Soul Dew applies on, t: Pokémon which the Soul Dew applies on, take not-very-effective damage from Ghost and Dark-type attacks.
Boosts Defense by one stage and sets Tri: Boosts Defense by one stage and sets Trick Room for 3-8 turns. If Trick Room is already active it will be reversed instead.
Terrain overlays and Room effects are un: Terrain overlays and Room effects are unchangable, turn timers for these effects won't progress and these effects cannot be activated or deactivated.
Boosts Speed by two stages and applies T: Boosts Speed by two stages and applies Torment.
Rattled boosts Speed upon switching in.
Shadow Tag reveals opposing held Items u: Shadow Tag reveals opposing held Items upon switching in.
Perish Body additionally prevents the Po: Perish Body additionally prevents the Pokémon that activated it from switching out while the user remains on the field.
Resuscitation restores all lowered stat: Resuscitation restores all lowered stat stages when activated.
Boosts Defense and Special Defense by on: Boosts Defense and Special Defense by one stage and applies Burn.
...when {movesOr} is used in the absence:
...when {movesOr} is used in the absence of Damp.
 Pokémon behind applicable protect moves, or having Flash Fire are immune to the damage.
Boosts Defense by 2 stages and applies P: Boosts Defense by 2 stages and applies Poison.
Fairy-type attacks hit Steel type Pokémo:
Fairy-type attacks hit Steel type Pokémon for super-effective damage.
Poison-type attacks hit Grass type Pokémon for neutral damage.
Fairy-type attacks hit Dark type Pokémon for neutral damage.
Dark-type attacks hit Fairy type Pokémon for neutral damage.
Grounded Grass-type Pokémon restore 1/16: Grounded Grass-type Pokémon restore 1/16th HP at the end of the turn.
Flower Veil will affect all types of Pok: Flower Veil will affect all types of Pokémon.
Pastel Veil additionally annulls user's: Pastel Veil additionally annulls user's Fairy-type's weaknesses at all times.
Curious Medicine clears all stat changes: Curious Medicine clears all stat changes on all battlers on entry.
Natural Cure additionally activates duri: Natural Cure additionally activates during the end of the turn.
Boosts Special Defense and applies Ingra: Boosts Special Defense and applies Ingrain to the user.
Entry Hazards except Stealth Rock are te: Entry Hazards except Stealth Rock are terminated.
The additional Flying Type of Flying Pre: The additional Flying Type of Flying Press doesn't account for resistances against the Flying-type.
Big Pecks boosts Defense upon switching: Big Pecks boosts Defense upon switching in.
Pokémon with the ability Long Reach deal: Pokémon with the ability Long Reach deal super-effective damage against the Flying-type with any move.
Boosts Defense and Special Defense by 1: Boosts Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.
When fainting a Pokémon the attacker gai: When fainting a Pokémon the attacker gains 1 stat stage in the highest stat of the fainted target.
Switching Pokémon is done in attacking o: Switching Pokémon is done in attacking order instead of the Start of the turn, as such faster attackers will attack before the switch is carried out. Shift-Mode is disabled.
Any effect that forces its opposing targ: Any effect that forces its opposing target to switch will fail. Other effects of the same move still apply.
{abilitiesAnd} boost Attack and Special: {abilitiesAnd} boost Attack and Special Attack upon switching in.
Pokémon with Rattled and Wimp Out will a: Pokémon with Rattled and Wimp Out will always be critically hit unless protected by Lucky Chant.
Skill Link additionally raises the damag: Skill Link additionally raises the damage of multi-hit attacks by 20%.
When Quick Draw activates the selected a: When Quick Draw activates the selected attack will also critically hit if possible.
Roar raises the users Attack by 2 stages: Roar raises the users Attack by 2 stages instead of force switching the opponent.
Boosts Attack and applies Taunt to the u: Boosts Attack and applies Taunt to the user.
{abilitiesAnd} boost Defense and Special: {abilitiesAnd} boost Defense and Special Defense upon switching in.
Pokemon with Wildfire ignore Fire-type i: Pokemon with Wildfire ignore Fire-type immunities.
Boosts Attack, Special Attack and traps: Boosts Attack, Special Attack and traps the user.

Any critical Hit aswell as the use of any of these moves: {moves}.

Any missed attack, changes to evasion stat stages, lowering of accuracy stages, aswell as the use of any of these moves: {moves}.
Additionally, these abilities lower the Hype one stage on switch-in: {abilities}
Hype returns to Stage 1 when {movesOr} l: Hype returns to Stage 1 when {movesOr} land a hit.
At lowest Hype the random factor of dama: At lowest Hype the random factor of damaging moves always use the lowest possible result.
At maximum Hype the random factor of dam: At maximum Hype the random factor of damaging moves always use the highest possible result. The Power of Moves with variable power is always the highest possible power.
All Sleep Effects fail on Hype Stage 3+. Pokémon that are asleep when Hype Stage 3+ is reached/created take 1/4 of their maximum Hp as damage as they are woken up. Comatose Pokémon are affected in the same way.
On Hype Stage 4 repeating the same attac: On Hype Stage 4 repeating the same attacking move on consecutive turns gives a 20% damage modifier for every turn the move is repeated up to a maximum of 100% increase damage. Identical to the effect of the Metronome item.
On Hype Stage 1 Magnitude and Fever Pitc: On Hype Stage 1 Magnitude and Fever Pitch always use the lowest Base Power Result.
On Hype Stage 4 Moves with variable Base: On Hype Stage 4 Moves with variable Base Power always use the highest Power.
{abilitiesAnd} boost Speed upon switchin: {abilitiesAnd} boost Speed upon switching in on Hype Stage 2 or higher.
Boosts Special Attack and applies Helpin: Boosts Special Attack and applies Helping Hand to the user.
All HP-Restoring effects, including Poti: All HP-Restoring effects, including Potions and other bag items, that don't explicitly recover 100% HP are reduced by 33%.
{movesAnd} double their Power when they: {movesAnd} double their Power when they succesfully steal an item from their target.
Frisk will steal the first stealable ite: Frisk will steal the first stealable item it reveals if the user doesn't have an item.
When fainting a target with the move Pur: When fainting a target with the move Pursuit, Speed is increased by 1 stage.
When Snatch is used succesfully a random: When Snatch is used succesfully a random Stat of the Snatch user is raised by 2 stages.

Purify boosts the user's Defense and Spe: Purify boosts the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage each when it succesfully removes a non-volatile status from its target.
Pokémon with Dark Aura restore their HP: Pokémon with Dark Aura restore their HP by 33% of the damage they dealt when they attack.
Aura abilities only affect moves from th: Aura abilities only affect moves from their own-side.
Beads of Ruin, Sword of Ruin, Tablets of:
Beads of Ruin, Sword of Ruin, Tablets of Ruin, and Vessel of Ruin do not reduce allies' stats. 
Sword of Ruin and Beads of Ruin the ignore Field Defense boost.
Neutralizing Gas clears all stat changes: Neutralizing Gas clears all stat changes on all battlers on entry.
Critical Hits against Pokémon holding an: Critical Hits against Pokémon holding an Amulet Coin will not receive a damage multiplier. Other effects of critical hits still apply.
Boosts Defense, Special Defense, and Spe: Boosts Defense, Special Defense, and Speed, but applies Perish Song to the user. Soundproof Pokémon are immune to the Perish Song effect.
